	}
}

antq_chattic = { # P8.7;P10;CAH-XI;CAM-GERM; Hessian Chatti regional proxy without fixing a tribal frontier
	language = antq_germanic_dialect
	color = antq_culture_color_antq_chattic
	tags = { european_gfx }
	culture_groups = {
		antq_germanic_group
	}
}

	language = antq_germanic_dialect
	color = antq_culture_color_antq_semnonic
	tags = { european_gfx }
	culture_groups = {
		antq_germanic_group
	}
}

	color = antq_culture_color_antq_hermunduric

		antq_germanic_group

	color = antq_culture_color_antq_istvaeonic

		antq_germanic_group

	color = antq_culture_color_antq_marcomannic

		antq_germanic_group

antq_quadi = { # P8.7;P10;OCD-QUA; Moravian Quadi regional proxy without extending it through the heterogeneous Slovakian scope
	language = antq_germanic_dialect
	color = antq_culture_color_antq_quadi
	tags = { european_gfx }
	culture_groups = {
		antq_germanic_group
	}
